expectations.text: The response mentions --add-dir as a CLI flag for adding directories
expectations.evidence: 'Use the --add-dir flag to give Claude access to additional directories'. Shows 'claude --add-dir ../frontend ../backend'.

expectations.text: The response mentions /add-dir as an in-session command alternative
expectations.evidence: Only mentions --add-dir CLI flag. Does not mention /add-dir as an in-session slash command.

expectations.text: The response explains that adding a directory gives Claude both visibility and permissions for that path
expectations.evidence: '--add-dir gives Claude file access to those directories'. Also mentions loading CLAUDE.md from added dirs.
